bird.name: 暗色歌百灵
bird.summary: 暗色歌百灵（學名：Mirafra pulpa）是百灵科歌百灵属的一种鳥類。這個物種可能是種行游猎迁徙的候鸟，分布于肯尼亚、坦桑尼亚和埃塞俄比亚，主要棲息於亚热带或热带的（低地）干草原，是以草籽、小型蚱蜢和甲蟲為食的植食性鳥類。 暗色歌百灵是1930年由美國鳥類學家赫爾伯特·傅利…

locations.name: Herbert Friedmann
locations.summary: Herbert Friedmann (April 22, 1900 – May 14, 1987) was an American ornithologist.

locations.name: 孔索
locations.summary: 孔索（Konso）是埃塞俄比亚西南部南方各族州的一个镇，有萨根河流经。本镇海拔约1650米，附近地区的人也将该地称为Pakawle。孔索文化景观于2011年列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。 世界遗产 该世界遗产被认为满足世界遺產登錄基準…

locations.name: 东察沃国家公园
locations.summary: 东察沃国家公园（Tsavo East National Park）是肯尼亚最古老、面積最大的公园之一，它占地13,747平方公里，位于前滨海省泰塔塔維塔郡的沃伊附近。當地是一個半干旱地区。它于1948年4月對外开放，公园被A109公路和铁…

locations.name: 阿鲁沙
locations.summary: 阿鲁沙（英語：Arusha）是一座位于坦桑尼亚东北部的城市，在乞力马扎罗山西南约90公里。它是坦桑尼亚阿魯沙區的首府，有人口约34万（2005年1月）也是東非共同體總部所在地。阿鲁沙的北部紧邻阿鲁沙国家公园，其中有梅鲁火山，及位于其山脚著…

relations.subject: 暗色歌百灵
relations.evidence: Friedmann's lark (Mirafra pulpa) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in East Africa

relations.subject: 暗色歌百灵
relations.evidence: Friedmann's lark is found in southern Ethiopia, central and south-eastern Kenya, and north-eastern Tanzania, but its population and exact range are very poorly known. The type specimen was collected in Ethiopia (from the Konso-Sagan area) in 1992, having been seen only one time since, in 1998; but most of what is known comes primarily from data collected in Tsavo East and West National Parks, in Kenya. There are also a few records from Tanzania, from Mkomazi Game Reserve, south of Arusha. In general, the natural habitats of Friedmann's lark are subtropical or tropical dry lowland grasslands. Being aloof and shy, it apparently chooses the moister (or less dry), ranker-growing of these areas, and where it can find it, those with more bush-cover

relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
